<p>Jury selection is to begin on Monday in a high-profile legal battle between billionaire Elon Musk and artificial intelligence (AI) startup OpenAI, which he accuses of betraying its non-profit mission.</p>

news.headline: Trump attends White House Correspondents' Dinner for first time as president
news.summary: President Donald Trump, famous for his clashes with reporters and denunciations of the “fake ​news” media, will attend the White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner on Saturday – his first time as president. news.headline: Gunfire rocks Bamako: 'Too soon to tell' if junta will fall
news.summary: Mali's army said Saturday that it was fighting "terrorist groups" that had attacked army barracks in the capital Bamako and other areas in the African nation. news.headline: Reverend Derek Li, father of injured Hong Kong Mirror dancer Mo Li, dies
news.summary:
The father of Mo Li Kai-yin, the dancer paralysed by a falling giant screen during a 2022 concert by popular Hong Kong boy band Mirror, has died.
